statement.markdown:
heading: ## Drag and Drop Sorter
description: Create a drag and drop sorter that can sort an array of numbers using a library of sorting algorithms. The user should be able to select a sorting algorithm, drag the elements to sort them, and see the sorted array at the end.
requirements
Implement multiple sorting algorithms (Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, Insertion Sort, Quick Sort, Merge Sort)
Allow user to select sorting algorithm using dropdown
Drag and drop elements to sort them
Display sorted array at the end
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling
